creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
The latest sparc64-9 build gets an error while trying to install some Intel-specific
files.  Apparently these are not built on sparc64 (makes sense).

The patch guesses that powerpc will be affected by the same change.  Not yet tested.

NB: results of plist generation with and without ARCH=sparc64 below.  This patch
does not need to be incorporated; I have just posted this as a sanity-test.  The
patch that needs to be applied is in Fix: .

20c20
< @comment include/libdrm/intel_bufmgr.h
---
> @comment @comment include/libdrm/intel_bufmgr.h
56,58c56,58
< lib/libdrm_intel.la
< lib/libdrm_intel.so
< lib/libdrm_intel.so.1
---
> @comment lib/libdrm_intel.la
> @comment lib/libdrm_intel.so
> @comment lib/libdrm_intel.so.1
69c69
< libdata/pkgconfig/libdrm_intel.pc
---
> @comment libdata/pkgconfig/libdrm_intel.pc

How-To-Repeat: See http://pointyhat.freebsd.org/errorlogs/sparc64-errorlogs/e.9.20120427045032/libdrm-2.4.17_1.log
